hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】贝莱德对产生收益的比特币 ETF 提出新修正案；彭博社分析师表示，预计很快就会推出；【WORLD】特朗普表示“我喜欢通货膨胀”，因为美国物价以三年来最快的速度上涨；【CRYPTO】Ondo Finance聘请前Invesco ETF负责人打造链上投资产品。

items.title: BlackRock files new amendment for yield-generating bitcoin ETF; launch expected soon, Bloomberg analyst says
items.summary: BlackRock's new bitcoin fund seeks to provide yield through active covered call strategies on IBIT shares and ETP indices.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德对产生收益的比特币 ETF 提出新修正案；彭博社分析师表示，预计很快就会推出
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德的新比特币基金旨在通过 IBIT 股票和 ETP 指数的主动备兑看涨策略提供收益。

items.title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' as US prices rise at fastest rate in three years
items.summary: The US president later said he had meant that he actually loved that inflation was not higher.
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示“我喜欢通货膨胀”，因为美国物价以三年来最快的速度上涨
items.summary_zh: 这位美国总统后来表示，他的意思是，他实际上很高兴通货膨胀率没有更高。

items.title: Ondo Finance hires former Invesco ETF chief to build onchain investment products
items.summary: John Hoffman will spearhead Ondo's expansion from tokenizing individual assets to full investment portfolios and strategies.
items.title_zh: Ondo Finance聘请前Invesco ETF负责人打造链上投资产品
items.summary_zh: 约翰·霍夫曼 (John Hoffman) 将带领 Ondo 从个人资产代币化扩展到完整的投资组合和策略。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S.-Iran Strikes Risk Dangerous New Phase
items.summary: The exchanges of fire this week have raised fears of a return to all-out war. The U.S. military struck another tanker it said was carrying Iranian oil and three Indians were reported killed in an earlier American attack at sea.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美伊袭击可能进入危险的新阶段
items.summary_zh: 本周的交火引发了人们对全面战争重新爆发的担忧。美国军方袭击了另一艘据称运载伊朗石油的油轮，据报道，三名印度人在美国早些时候的海上袭击中丧生。

items.title: It's not SpaceX. Bitcoin ETF outflows may be an arbitrage story
items.summary: While some analysts argue investors are selling bitcoin to free up capital for anticipated IPOs such as SpaceX and Anthropic, Sygnum's Fabian Dori says market data points elsewhere.
items.title_zh: 这不是 SpaceX。比特币 ETF 流出可能是一个套利故事
items.summary_zh: 尽管一些分析师认为投资者出售比特币是为了为 SpaceX 和 Anthropic 等预期的 IPO 腾出资金，但 Sygnum 的 Fabian Dori 表示，市场数据来自其他地方。

items.title: Michael Saylor and Jack Mallers go toe-to-toe over Strategy's bitcoin reporting metrics
items.summary: The two bitcoin treasury leaders renewed the debate over Strategy's mNAV and dilution, with Saylor arguing that equity issuance for cash strengthens, rather than dilutes, shareholders.
items.title_zh: Michael Saylor 和 Jack Mallers 就 Strategy 的比特币报告指标展开针锋相对
items.summary_zh: 两位比特币金库领导人重新引发了有关 Strategy 的 mNAV 和稀释的争论，Saylor 认为，现金发行股票会增强而不是稀释股东的实力。

items.title: Bitcoin advances, holds above key technical level that ether, solana can't break through
items.summary: BTC's dominance rate has risen from last week's low, a sign of renewed capital flowing into the largest cryptocurrency as major altcoins struggle.
items.title_zh: 比特币进步，保持在以太坊、solana 无法突破的关键技术水平之上
items.summary_zh: 比特币的主导地位已从上周的低点上升，这是在主要山寨币陷入困境之际，资金重新流入最大的加密货币的迹象。

items.title: The Incentive Dynamic Engine: io.net’s Shift to Sustainable Tokenomics
items.summary: DePIN Needs a Tokenomics Reset In recent years, DePINs have surged in prominence, offering a revolutionary model for scaling physical infrastructure through community-driven participation. By leveraging blockchain to coordinate resources like compute power and storage, these prot
items.title_zh: 激励动态引擎：io.net 向可持续代币经济的转变
items.summary_zh: DePIN 需要重置代币经济学 近年来，DePIN 的地位日益凸显，为通过社区驱动的参与来扩展物理基础设施提供了革命性的模式。通过利用区块链来协调计算能力和存储等资源，这些优势

items.title: KKR says AI productivity boom to keep on going — but warns of 'extreme' trend not seen since the 19th century
items.summary: KKR said in its mid-year outlook Thursday that AI will drive economic growth for years to come, but only in specific sectors.
items.title_zh: KKR 表示人工智能生产力繁荣将持续下去，但警告称，可能会出现 19 世纪以来从未出现过的“极端”趋势
items.summary_zh: KKR 在周四的年中展望中表示，人工智能将在未来几年推动经济增长，但仅限于特定领域。

items.title: Citigroup shares outperform down market after Trump endorsement
items.summary: Jane Fraser-led Citi fell 1%, less than the rest of the market and some other major banks, after Trump lauded its turnaround in a social media post.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持后，花旗集团股价跑赢下跌市场
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普在社交媒体帖子中赞扬花旗集团的转变后，简·弗雷泽领导的花旗集团股价下跌 1%，跌幅低于市场其他股票和其他一些主要银行。

items.title: Regulators' proposed prediction markets rules ban trading on terrorism, assassinations
items.summary: The proposed rules from the commission will now face a public comment period.
items.title_zh: 监管机构提议的预测市场规则禁止恐怖主义、暗杀交易
items.summary_zh: 该委员会拟议的规则现在将面临公众意见征询期。

items.title: Thai court sentences two men to death over Bangkok shrine bombing
items.summary: Twenty people died and 120 others were injured in the explosion at the Erawan shrine 11 years ago.
items.title_zh: 泰国曼谷圣地爆炸案两名男子被泰国法院判处死刑
items.summary_zh: 11年前，四面佛发生爆炸，造成20人死亡、120人受伤。

items.title: The War in Ukraine Has Now Gone On Longer Than World War I
items.summary: Parallels between the two wars abound, from the grinding nature of the fighting to the way new technologies reshaped warfare.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰战争的持续时间比第一次世界大战还长
items.summary_zh: 从战斗的残酷性到新技术重塑战争的方式，这两场战争之间有很多相似之处。

items.title: Two Men Sentenced to Death for 2015 Bangkok Bombing
items.summary: A Thai court convicted the men, who are Uyghur, for a terrorist attack at a Hindu shrine that killed 20 and injured dozens more.
items.title_zh: 两名男子因 2015 年曼谷爆炸案被判处死刑
items.summary_zh: 泰国一家法院判定这些维吾尔族男子对一座印度教圣地发动恐怖袭击，造成 20 人死亡、数十人受伤。

items.title: Protests Threaten to Disrupt Mexico City’s World Cup Opening Ceremony
items.summary: Unions and other groups plan to demonstrate at the capital’s World Cup stadium, adding tension as the much-watched event begins.
items.title_zh: 抗议活动可能扰乱墨西哥城的世界杯开幕式
items.summary_zh: 工会和其他团体计划在首都世界杯体育场举行示威，这在这场备受关注的赛事开始时加剧了紧张气氛。

items.title: Canton Network developer raises $355 million to bring Wall Street onchain
items.summary: The investment comes as blockchains designed for big banks and institutions are having a moment, with Stripe's Tempo and Circle's Arc raising hundreds of millions of dollars.
items.title_zh: Canton Network 开发商筹集 3.55 亿美元，将华尔街带入链上
items.summary_zh: 此次投资正值专为大型银行和机构设计的区块链风靡一时，Stripe 的 Tempo 和 Circle 的 Arc 筹集了数亿美元。

items.title: Citi opens new route into private markets with tokenized share offering
items.summary: The bank said it is using blockchain technology to connect investors with private company equity through digital depositary receipts.
items.title_zh: 花旗通过代币化股票发行开辟进入私人市场的新途径
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示，正在利用区块链技术通过数字存托凭证将投资者与私人公司股权联系起来。

items.title: Hungary to scrap Orban-era crypto rules that carried jail terms: reports
items.summary: Hungary will decriminalize crypto trading, reversing Orban-era rules that carried jail terms and led platforms like Revolut to suspend services.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利将废除欧尔班时代的加密货币规则：报道称
items.summary_zh: 匈牙利将把加密货币交易合法化，扭转欧尔班时代的规定，这些规定包括监禁和导致 Revolut 等平台暂停服务。

items.title: Bernstein calls FIFA World Cup a ‘watershed moment’ for prediction markets, projects $5-10B consumer volume surge
items.summary: Bernstein sees the FIFA World Cup as a potential watershed moment for prediction markets, projecting a $5B to $10B uplift in volume.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 称 FIFA 世界杯是预测市场的“分水岭”，预计 $5-10B 消费者数量激增
items.summary_zh: Bernstein 将 FIFA 世界杯视为预测市场的潜在分水岭，预计交易量将增加 5B 至 10B 美元。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #966.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：AXION (AXION)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#966。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 125 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #113.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 113 位。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch
items.summary: A spokesperson for the company said that the product is the fastest growing in the prediction market platform's history.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 的“perps”交易量在推出一周内就突破了 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司发言人表示，该产品是预测市场平台历史上增长最快的产品。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) gains 4.5% as all constituents rise
items.summary: Solana (SOL), up 2.6% from Wednesday, was also a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：随着所有成分股上涨，Uniswap (UNI) 上涨 4.5%
items.summary_zh: Solana (SOL) 较周三上涨 2.6%，也是表现最好的股票。

items.title: Visa says stablecoins are ‘reshaping the back end’ of commerce as it expands AI, tokenization efforts
items.summary: Visa said stablecoins are reshaping commerce as it unveiled new AI tools, tokenization features, and a partnership with OpenAI.
items.title_zh: Visa表示，稳定币正在“重塑商业后端”，因为它扩大了人工智能和代币化的努力
items.summary_zh: Visa 表示，随着稳定币推出新的人工智能工具、代币化功能以及与 OpenAI 的合作，稳定币正在重塑商业。

items.title: Figure to acquire Kiavi for $717 million to expand RWA tokenization network
items.summary: Figure said moving Kiavi assets onchain could reduce costs while maintaining a capital-light, high-margin business model.
items.title_zh: Figure 将以 7.17 亿美元收购 Kiavi，扩大 RWA 代币化网络
items.summary_zh: 图表示，将 Kiavi 资产转移到链上可以降低成本，同时保持轻资本、高利润的商业模式。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.title_zh: 通过 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 通过 Oracle Cloud 访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，利用现有承诺构建和部署具有企业安全性和治理的 AI。

items.title: Introducing North Mini Code: Cohere’s First Model For Developers
items.title_zh: North Mini Code 简介：Cohere 为开发人员提供的第一个模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: North Carolina treasurer passes on SpaceX citing valuation concerns; favors OpenAI, Anthropic
items.summary: North Carolina has invested heavily in AI startups OpenAI and Anthropic while avoiding a direct stake in SpaceX.
items.title_zh: 北卡罗来纳州财长以估值担忧为由放弃了 SpaceX；支持 OpenAI、Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 北卡罗来纳州对人工智能初创公司 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 进行了大量投资，同时避免直接持有 SpaceX 的股份。

items.title: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
items.summary: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.
items.title_zh: 网络安全公司称，北京正在升级人工智能间谍活动，以在科技领域赶上美国
items.summary_zh: 美国网络安全巨头 CrowdStrike 表示，超过一半的国家资助的针对科技公司的人工智能资产网络攻击是由中国实体发起的。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通计划今年部署更强大的人工智能代理
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，长期运行的人工智能代理即将消除阻碍大公司内部采用的安全和治理障碍。

items.title: Electric vehicle giant BYD predicts 80% of China car sales will soon be electric
items.summary: BYD expects China's competitive electric vehicle market to continue growing, even as manufacturers and analysts anticipate domestic demand to taper further.
items.title_zh: 电动汽车巨头比亚迪预测中国汽车销量的80%很快将是电动汽车
items.summary_zh: 比亚迪预计，尽管制造商和分析师预计国内需求将进一步减少，但中国竞争激烈的电动汽车市场将继续增长。

items.title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
items.summary: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.
items.title_zh: 这家初创公司希望减少预测市场的支付摩擦
items.summary_zh: EDGE Markets 向 CNBC 独家透露，该公司宣布推出两款新产品，以解决预测市场的支付问题。

items.title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
items.summary: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.
items.title_zh: 香港IPO热潮正引发绩效问题
items.summary_zh: 随着香港与华尔街争夺最大的IPO市场，越来越多的上市前股价在上市后表现不佳。

items.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
items.summary: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.
items.title_zh: 科学家称厄尔尼诺现象正在发生并威胁极端天气
items.summary_zh: 美国科学家表示，厄尔尼诺现象已经正式开始，引发了人们对极端天气和高温的担忧。

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
items.summary: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗连续第二天在中东地区交锋
items.summary_zh: 伊朗表示，它以美国在科威特、约旦和巴林的资产为目标来回应美国的袭击，据报道，伊朗首都隔夜遭到破坏。

items.title: The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
items.summary: The final conclusions of the investigation have yet to be published, although more could become apparent in the coming days.
items.title_zh: 印度航空171号航班坠毁原因引发激烈争论
items.summary_zh: 调查的最终结论尚未公布，但未来几天可能会公布更多结论。

items.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
items.summary: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.
items.title_zh: 万斯称以色列总理内塔尼亚胡“犯了一些错误”
items.summary_zh: 美国副总统表示，以色列领导人“积极维护”其国家的利益，但这些利益并不总是与美国的利益保持一致。

items.title: Knicks fans go wild as New York team makes biggest comeback in NBA Finals history
items.summary: Wednesday's result means the team are now just one win away from a famous Finals win.
items.title_zh: 尼克斯队球迷疯狂，纽约队实现 NBA 总决赛历史上最大的逆转
items.summary_zh: 周三的结果意味着球队现在距离著名的总决赛胜利仅差一场胜利。

items.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight perilous journeys of migrants
items.summary: During his trip, the Pope will appeal for a humane approach and respectful welcome for migrants seeking a better life.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥访问加那利群岛强调移民的危险旅程
items.summary_zh: 在访问期间，教宗将呼吁以人道的方式并尊重地欢迎寻求更好生活的移民。

items.title: Olivia Rodrigo sings about heartbreak but she's already chosen her wedding song
items.summary: The pop star discusses the difficulty of writing happy songs, and her Glastonbury anxiety attack.
items.title_zh: 奥利维亚·罗德里戈 (Olivia Rodrigo) 唱着关于心碎的歌，但她已经选择了婚礼歌曲
items.summary_zh: 这位流行歌星讨论了创作快乐歌曲的困难，以及她的格拉斯顿伯里焦虑症。

items.title: Four days of extreme rain killed 7% of world's rarest orangutans, study says
items.summary: Climate change-induced weather events are pushing orangutan populations to extinction, says a study.
items.title_zh: 研究称四天的极端降雨导致世界上 7% 的稀有猩猩死亡
items.summary_zh: 一项研究称，气候变化引发的天气事件正在将猩猩种群推向灭绝。

items.title: U.K. Defense Secretary Resigns, in a Blow to Starmer
items.summary: John Healey unexpectedly announced that he was stepping down, saying Prime Minister Keir Starmer was failing to invest enough money in the British military.
items.title_zh: 英国国防部长辞职，对斯塔默造成打击
items.summary_zh: 约翰·希利出人意料地宣布辞职，称首相基尔·斯塔默未能向英国军队投入足够的资金。

items.title: This Is Mexico and Canada’s World Cup, Too. Don’t Expect Unity.
items.summary: Mexico and Canada have faced significant recent tension in their relations with the United States. But in their historic World Cup bid, the three countries promoted teamwork.
items.title_zh: 这也是墨西哥和加拿大的世界杯。不要指望团结。
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥和加拿大最近与美国的关系面临严重紧张。但在历史性的世界杯申办中，这三个国家提倡团队合作。

items.title: Women Who Fled Iran Are to Be Deported to Central African Republic, Lawyers Say
items.summary: The women are among nearly two dozen people slated to be sent to a country where the U.S. government has advised “Do not travel for any reason.”
items.title_zh: 律师称，逃离伊朗的妇女将被驱逐到中非共和国
items.summary_zh: 这些女性是计划被送往美国政府建议“不要以任何理由旅行”的国家的近两打人之一。

items.title: Why Mexico’s President Will Not Attend the World Cup Opening Match
items.summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum of Mexico plans to intentionally skip the entire tournament, breaking a decades-long tradition of sports diplomacy.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥总统为何不出席世界杯揭幕战
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥总统克劳迪娅·辛鲍姆计划有意缺席整个赛事，这打破了长达数十年的体育外交传统。

items.title: In a Trump-Endorsed Presidential Candidate, Colombia’s Women See a Familiar Far-Right Playbook
items.summary: Colombia’s presidential front-runner has sparked a debate about masculinity and machismo. Women’s rights groups see a familiar right-wing playbook.

items.title: A.I. and the Chip Boom: Take a Quiz on New Korean Slang and Memes
